# GitHub Automation

This directory contains the repository automation assets for the JOC monorepo.

## Included

- GitHub Actions workflows for CI, pull request validation, quality checks, and CodeQL
- GitHub Actions workflow for release preparation
- Dependabot configuration
- Issue templates
- Pull request template
- Recommended labels and repository security settings documentation

Package publication is still intentionally disabled. The release workflow currently prepares version pull requests and draft GitHub releases only.
